event_comments:
Some courses included a major road crossing. For safety reasons, a control was placed on each side of the road and your split times between these controls has been deducted from your overall time. Results below reflect final standings.
Unfortunately, neither WinSplits nor Attackpoint can display splits correctly with untimed legs, so ALL your splits are included on these sites.
cumulative_event_comments:
Some courses included a major road crossing. For safety reasons, a control was placed on each side of the road and your split times between these controls has been deducted from your overall time. Results below reflect final standings.
